channel.title: SavingSec
channel.description: Professional product reviews, coupon codes & deal aggregation platform

item.title: About Us
item.description:
About SavingSec

SavingSec is a content e-commerce platform focused on product reviews and deal aggregation.

Our Mission

Helping users discover truly worth-buying products, making purchase decisions through professional reviews and real data.

How We Earn

We earn commissions through affiliate partnerships with e-commerce platforms. When you purchase products through our links, we may receive a percentage of the commission, which does not affect your purchase price.

Content Principles

  • Objective and Fair: All reviews are based on actual use and testing
  • Transparent Disclosure: Clearly labeled affiliate relationships
  • Continuous Updates: Regularly updated prices and deal information

item.title: Affiliate Disclosure
item.description:
Affiliate Disclosure

SavingSec participates in various e-commerce platform affiliate programs.

What is Affiliate Marketing?

Affiliate marketing is a performance-based advertising model. When we direct users to our partner merchants’ websites through links and a purchase is made, we may earn a commission.

Does this affect your purchase price?

No. The price of products purchased through our links is exactly the same as visiting the merchant’s website directly.

How do we ensure fairness?

  • Review content is based on actual usage experience
  • Whether we recommend or not has nothing to do with commission levels
  • We clearly label all affiliate marketing links
  • We prioritize recommending products with real value

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Contact Us

If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to contact us through the following methods.

Email

Assnent@gmail.com

Business Cooperation

Assnent@gmail.com

Product Recommendations

If you have good products to recommend, please send an email to Assnent@gmail.com with the following information:

  • Product name and brand
  • Product official website link
  • Product introduction
  • Sample provision (if available)

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

SavingSec takes the protection of your privacy seriously.

Information We Collect

  • Browser Data: Anonymous browsing data is collected via cookies to improve user experience
  • Email Address: Collected only when you actively subscribe to the newsletter

GDPR Compliance (EU Users)

For users in the European Economic Area (EEA), we process your data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). You have the right to:

  • Access: You can request a copy of the personal data we hold
  • Rectification: You can request correction of inaccurate data
  • Erasure: You can request deletion of your personal data (“right to be forgotten”)
  • Restriction: You can request restriction of processing of your data
  • Portability: You can receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
  • Objection: You can object to the processing of your data

Cookie Usage

We use cookies to:

  • Remember your search preferences
  • Analyze website traffic
  • Optimize content presentation

Third-Party Services

We may use the following third-party services:

  • Google Analytics: Website traffic analysis
  • Cloudflare: CDN and security services

Your Rights

  • Unsubscribe from the newsletter at any time
  • Request deletion of your personal data
  • Opt out of cookie tracking

Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

Data Retention

We retain your personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected or as required by law.

Contact Us

For privacy-related questions, please contact us at: Assnent@gmail.com

item.title: Cookie Policy
item.description:
Cookie Policy

The SavingSec website uses cookies and similar technologies to provide, protect, and improve our services.

What are Cookies

Cookies are small text files stored in your browser. They are commonly used to make websites function effectively.

Types of Cookies We Use

1. Essential Cookies These cookies are necessary for the proper operation of the website. They ensure basic functionality such as page navigation.

2. Analytics Cookies We use analytics cookies to understand how users interact with our website and to improve content and user experience.

3. Functional Cookies These cookies allow the website to remember your choices (such as language settings) and provide a more personalized experience.

Third-Party Cookies

Our website may contain third-party content, such as social media plugins, embedded videos, or advertisements. These third parties may set their own cookies. We have no control over these cookies and recommend you review the respective third-party privacy policies.

GDPR Notice (EU Users)

Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), we obtain your consent to use non-essential cookies. You can withdraw your consent at any time through the cookie settings on our website.

Managing Cookies

You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect certain website features.

Most browsers allow you to:

  • View all cookies and delete them individually
  • Block third-party cookies
  • Block all cookies
  • Delete all cookies when you close your browser

Contact Us

If you have questions about our Cookie Policy, please contact us at: Assnent@gmail.com

item.title: Disclaimer
item.description:
Disclaimer

Important Notice

Please read this disclaimer carefully before using the SavingSec website. By using this site, you agree to the terms of this disclaimer.

Subjectivity of Reviews

All product reviews on this website are based on the personal experiences and subjective opinions of the authors. Different users may have entirely different experiences with the same product. Reviews serve only as references and do not constitute guarantees or warranties for products.

Price and Promotion Information

  • All price information on this website is for reference only. Actual prices are based on e-commerce platforms
  • Prices change in real-time; we cannot guarantee the permanent validity of prices
  • Coupons and promo codes may expire or become invalid at any time
  • We are not responsible for price differences caused by price changes

Third-Party Products

  • This website does not sell any physical goods
  • All products are provided and sold by third-party e-commerce platforms or merchants
  • For any questions regarding product quality, customer service, returns, or exchanges, please contact the corresponding merchant or platform directly
  • This website assumes no responsibility for third-party product customer service

Nature of Content as Shopping Guide

  • This website serves only as a shopping guide platform and directs users to e-commerce platforms through referral links
  • We may earn commissions through affiliate marketing links, but this does not affect your purchase price
  • Links are provided for user convenience only; we are not responsible for the content or security of third-party sites

Intellectual Property

  • The content on this website (text, images, reviews, etc.) is protected by copyright
  • Without permission, reprinting or quoting content from this site is prohibited
  • Some images may come from e-commerce platforms or brands; copyright remains with the original rights holder

Contact Us

If you have questions or complaints about the content on this website, please contact us at: Assnent@gmail.com

item.title: Refund & Support Guide
item.description:
Refund & Support Guide

Important Information

SavingSec is a shopping guide website that does not directly sell products and assumes no responsibility for product after-sales service.

After-Sales Service Processing

All after-sales services related to products, including refunds, returns, exchanges, and warranties, are handled by the e-commerce platform or merchant that sold the product. All refunds are processed exclusively through the respective e-commerce platform, not through SavingSec.

Common Issues Guide

1. Coupons Cannot Be Used

  • Please check if the coupon is still valid
  • Confirm if the terms of use are met (minimum order value, applicable products, etc.)
  • If the coupon is expired or cannot be used, please search for current deals on the corresponding e-commerce platform

2. Order-Related Issues

  • Order status check: Please log in to the corresponding e-commerce platform to check
  • Tracking: Use the tracking number provided by the e-commerce platform
  • Shipping delays: Please contact the merchant’s customer service directly

3. Refunds and Returns

  • Refund application: Submit your request through the order page on the e-commerce platform
  • Return process: Follow the instructions from the e-commerce platform
  • Refund timeline: Subject to each e-commerce platform’s refund policy
  • Note: All refunds are processed through the e-commerce platform, not through SavingSec

4. Product Quality Issues

  • Please inspect the product as soon as possible after receipt
  • If there are quality issues, please request after-sales service through the e-commerce platform
  • Keep the product packaging and relevant receipts

5. Warranty Service

  • Product warranty is the responsibility of the brand or merchant
  • Please keep your purchase receipt and warranty card
  • Contact the brand’s official customer service or authorized repair centers

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this guide, please contact us at: Assnent@gmail.com
